nasb.text: In respect to an ox or a lamb which has an overgrown or stunted member, you may present it for a freewill offering, but for a vow it will not be accepted.

esv.text: You may present a bull or a lamb that has a part too long or too short for a freewill offering, but for a vow offering it cannot be accepted.

cnv.text: 無論是公牛或是綿羊羔，如果肢體畸形或有缺陷的，你可以作甘心祭獻上；如果作還願祭獻上，就不蒙悅納。

ccb.text: 至于畸形或发育不全的公牛或绵羊羔，可以用作自愿献的祭，但不可用作还愿祭。
